Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10891 0 0}Dude, my knee just keeps getting worse...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10872 0 0}Man, why do I even bother anymore? What's the point of going through all this pain just to win...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10855 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}Yeah... Yeah, you're right! I hate losing! Er, was the answer that simple?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 1 25 25}Sorry for getting all whiny on you... That's not me. Thanks for the wake-up call. I'm good now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10855 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}Y-Yeah! If I give up now, he might never find the courage to walk on his own two feet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}But I can barely deal with my own problems right now... Can I even help him with his?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10887 0 0}C'mon, dude, don't be like that... I couldn't figure out anything, so that's why I came to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10850 0 0}Guess all I've got now is my last resort: divine intervention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}After we finish eating, I'm gonna stop by the shrine. I'll make sure to toss in more coins than usual when praying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After seeing Miyamoto off to the[n]shrine, I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
